text: I feel a mood of curiosity mingled with anticipation. The first scene suggests a quiet, ordered environment, perhaps just before a presentation or event—glass, light, and silence making me feel contemplative and small among vast ideas. In the second scene, I am drawn deeper into the world of innovation and research. The colorful displays and bold "R+D" signal creativity and progress, inviting me to reflect on human curiosity, our urge to understand and build. I sense excitement, wanting to learn, and a subtle awe at how ideas shape reality.
